subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Transform this darksome world into a realm of light, and these manifestations of Satan into righteous souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين عالم ظلمانی را جهان انوار فرما و مظاهر شيطانی را ابرار
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
